results.title: TN CM Vijay Wasn't FIRST Choice For Jana Nayagan, Director H Vinoth Approached Another Actor
results.description: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Vijay's film, Jana Nayagan, is scheduled to release in theatres on July 23. Ahead of that, it has been revealed that he wasn't the first choice for H Vinoth's film.

results.title: Pune: Sub-Registrar Brutally Assaulted Inside Office After Refusing Document Registration - VIDEO
results.description: A sub-registrar was allegedly assaulted inside his office in Pune's Ambegaon after refusing to register a document due to incomplete paperwork, police said. The officer sustained injuries and was hospitalised, while a video of the attack went viral. Police have registered a case

results.title: Panel formed to select Kerala State Commission for Protection of Child Rights chief
results.description: Kerala forms a committee to select the new chairperson for the State Commission for Protection of Child Rights.

results.title: Crude Oil Gains Nearly 1 Pc To Rs 8,014/barrel In Futures Trade
results.description: Analysts said crude prices gained after Iran carried out retaliatory attacks against US-linked military installations in Jordan and Bahrain following Washington's airstrikes,
